message:
fix: validate persisted AI mode + replace Sleep with context-aware timer (#6855, #6819) (#6868)

* fix: validate persisted AI mode against known-good enum values (#6855)

localStorage can hold stale/invalid AI mode values from older builds or
manual edits. The hook now validates the stored string against the set of
valid AIMode values and falls back to the default ('medium') if invalid,
preventing downstream crashes when config.features is accessed.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: replace time.Sleep with context-aware select in fork retry loop (#6819)

time.Sleep blocks the goroutine unconditionally, which can exhaust
Fiber's goroutine pool under concurrent fork requests. Switch to a
select on time.After + c.UserContext().Done() so the retry is
cancelled immediately when the client disconnects.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
